criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads of the app.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Active Users
criteria.description: Monthly active users of the app.

criteria.name: Content Library Size
criteria.description: Size of the content library (number of songs, movies, shows, etc.).

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalization, recommendations, and other features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, tech reviews, company blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's user interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert opinions

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of subscription plans if applicable.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company websites

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company websites

criteria.name: Social Features
criteria.description: Availability of social features like sharing, commenting, etc.
